title: hieracium dentatum subsp. trefferianum
intro: Hieracium dentatum subsp. trefferianum, also known as Treffer's hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium dentatum subsp. trefferianum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
